configurations.name: portfolio
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir='/Volumes/Extreme SSD/Claude Code';const types={'.html':'text/html','.js':'text/javascript','.css':'text/css','.svg':'image/svg+xml','.mp4':'video/mp4','.mov':'video/quicktime','.webm':'video/webm','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.jpeg':'image/jpeg','.png':'image/png','.webp':'image/webp','.gif':'image/gif','.ico':'image/x-icon','.json':'application/json'};http.createServer((req,res)=>{let u=decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0]);if(u==='/')u='/index.html';const f=path.join(dir,u);const type=types[path.extname(f)]||'application/octet-stream';fs.stat(f,(statErr,stat)=>{if(statErr){res.writeHead(404);res.end('not found');return;}const range=req.headers.range;if(range){const m=/bytes=(\d*)-(\d*)/.exec(range);let start=m[1]?parseInt(m[1],10):0;let end=m[2]?parseInt(m[2],10):stat.size-1;if(end>=stat.size)end=stat.size-1;const chunkSize=end-start+1;res.writeHead(206,{'Content-Range':`bytes ${start}-${end}/${stat.size}`,'Accept-Ranges':'bytes','Content-Length':chunkSize,'Content-Type':type});fs.createReadStream(f,{start,end}).pipe(res);}else{res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':type,'Content-Length':stat.size,'Accept-Ranges':'bytes'});fs.createReadStream(f).pipe(res);}});}).listen(4321,()=>console.log('up on 4321'));
